products.name: Hand-thrown Terracotta Vase
products.description: Wheel-thrown terracotta vase fired in a traditional wood kiln. Each piece has slight variations in glaze — no two are identical.

products.name: Dhaka Weave Table Runner
products.description: Handwoven cotton table runner using the traditional dhaka pattern, made on a pit loom.

products.name: Silver Filigree Earrings
products.description: Fine silver filigree earrings, hand-soldered using a technique passed down through three generations of Patan silversmiths.

products.name: Walnut Wood Chess Set
products.description: Hand-carved walnut wood chess set with a folding board. Weighted pieces, felt-lined base.

products.name: Lokta Paper Journal
products.description: Hand-bound journal made from lokta bark paper, naturally insect-resistant and traditionally used for centuries-old manuscripts.

products.name: Glazed Ceramic Tea Set
products.description: Four-cup ceramic tea set with hand-painted indigo glaze detailing, fired twice for durability.

products.name: Hemp Fiber Shoulder Bag
products.description: Woven hemp fiber bag with leather strap. Naturally durable and biodegradable material sourced from local hill farms.

products.name: Turquoise Pendant Necklace
products.description: Sterling silver pendant set with a raw-cut turquoise stone, on an adjustable chain.

products.name: Carved Wooden Mask
products.description: Decorative wall mask hand-carved from sal wood, inspired by traditional Newari architectural motifs.

products.name: Lokta Paper Lantern Set
products.description: Set of three folding lanterns made from dyed lokta paper over a bamboo frame. LED-safe, not for open flame.

products.name: Block-Printed Cotton Scarf
products.description: Hand block-printed cotton scarf using natural dyes and hand-carved wooden printing blocks.

products.name: Stoneware Dinner Bowls (Set of 4)
products.description: Set of four stoneware bowls with a matte reactive glaze finish. Microwave and dishwasher safe.
